description_long: This is an adult woman depicted in a mid-stride walking pose, with her left leg forward and right arm bent at the waist. She is wearing a knee-length, short-sleeved dress with a deep V-neckline and fitted waist, giving a formal yet casual appearance. Her shoes are classic closed-toe heels, suitable for urban or professional environments. The figure's hair is long, straight, and parted to the side, falling past her shoulders. Her facial features are neutral, and her posture is upright and confident, suggesting purposeful movement. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall form is realistic and proportionate.
description: An adult woman in a knee-length dress and heels, walking with a confident, upright posture and long straight hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dress's neckline, facial features, and forward stride.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the arm bent at the waist and the profile of the dress and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the dress, hair length, and walking posture.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite arm and leg positions, and the side profile of the head and dress.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved knee-length dress with a deep V-neckline and fitted waist
attribute_hairstyle: long straight hair parted to the side
